---
title: "Data"
---

This chapter provides the files you will need for class activities and assignments.

### Download Data Files

- [Download survey dataset (Excel)](Begin-semester%20survey%20EPSY%205244_Qualtrics%20data.xlsx){download="Begin-semester survey EPSY 5244_Qualtrics data.xlsx"}
- [Download survey codebook (Excel)](EPSY5244_survey_codebook.xlsx){download="EPSY5244_survey_codebook.xlsx"}

### File Descriptions

- **Survey dataset**: Includes the raw survey responses from the beginning-of-semester EPSY 5244 survey.
- **Survey codebook**: Defines variable names, value labels, missing data codes, and item meanings.

### Load Data in R

```{r}
# install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)

survey_data <- read_excel(
  "Begin-semester survey EPSY 5244_Qualtrics data.xlsx",
  sheet = "data"
)

codebook <- read_excel("EPSY5244_survey_codebook.xlsx")
```
